name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I want to thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I want to take a quick moment to thank you.

We've had a busy start to this week. First, we faced a key fundraising goal as we entered the last 50 days until Election Day. Then, we launched my newest television ad, focusing on our public lands ([**in case you missed it, watch it here**](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-media-fund-sept?amount=29&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+in+case+you+missed+it+watch+it+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180919_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180919_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_180919_2_2")).

_**You didn 't miss a beat -- thank you.**_

There's still a lot of work ahead of us. As of tomorrow, we're one month away from the start of early voting in New Mexico. That means keeping my newest television ad on the air is more important than ever as voters prepare to cast their votes soon.

_We 're 31 days out from when the first ballots in my race will be cast._ My team and I will continue to keep you updated about the changing state of our race and how you can help us defend my Senate seat in a critical year for Democrats.

Thanks again for all you do,

Martin

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[Donate $10](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year
body:
Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-j/)
As I've mentioned in previous blog posts, one of Congressional Republicans' greatest challenges this election cycle is historical. And that's that when one party wins the presidency, the other party almost always picks up seats in the next election. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [If the Democrats Win - Get Ready for Impeachment](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-d/)
Democrats, for the most part, hate Donald Trump. There are, of course, a few exceptions. And there are a few Republicans, and a fair number of Independents, who don't care for him either. But most Democrats - they think he's gotta go. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Fact Checking the Fact Checker](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-u/)
The Cincinnati Enquirer is supposed to be the local paper of record. The one local folks go to who still read the paper - which is evidently a smaller and smaller population every year. My wife and I still get it, but I think they're down to two families on our block that do (including us.) Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-b/) [McCain and Me](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-n/)Since word came out that John McCain had passed away over the weekend, there have been many tributes to this Arizona Senator, American war hero, and almost-President. Rather than repeat a lot of what you've probably seen or heard since then, I thought I'd touch on a number of interactions I've had with him over the years. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-p/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [Democrat Candidates for Congress are Misleading the Public](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-m/)
Democrats running for congress across the country are doing everything they can to mislead the public on a number of key issues. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-c/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-a/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-v/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Like ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-s/)
[ Tweet ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-g/)
[ Forward ](http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jjdtpll-l-w)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jjdtpll-961825B2-kujkulhluu-yd) | [Unsubscribe](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jjdtpll-kujkulhluu-yh/)

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Fwd: I want to say this before my movie Fahrenheit 11/9 premieres
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Please read this important message from filmmaker Michael Moore
#
Friends,
Our country is in crisis. Please read this important message from filmmaker Michael Moore about what's at stake, why he made his latest film, and the action we can take to reclaim our democracy. **Once you've read, pitch in to help Our Revolution keep up the fight for a progressive future.**
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf6/38127536/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180919&noskip=true")**
\----------Forwarded message----------
From: Michael Moore
Subject: I want to say this before my movie Fahrenheit 11/9 premieres
Friends,
I ask one simple question in my new film: how the hell did we let this happen and **what the hell do we do now?**
This Friday, September 21, when _" Fahrenheit 11/9"_ hits theater screens all across America, you'll see that I pull no punches while exploring these questions.
That's because we are in a state of emergency.
Democracy is not a guarantee. Freedom is not inevitable. All of the myths and heroic tales we've told ourselves about America have been exposed. The mask has been removed. And in the battle for the future of America, there is no guarantee of victory.
**Hope, alone will not save us. In order to prevail, we need action.**
Our Revolution has spent the last two years committed to direct action. They are building a revolution to take on President Donald Trump and the sick system that gave us him in the first place. **Here's how:**
1. Creating grassroots political power with hundreds of thousands of members across the country and around the world.
2. Organizing to vote out the political establishment and vote in the next generation of progressive leaders.
3. Fighting for policies the majority of Americans support but are told over and over again are unrealistic - issues like Medicare for All, tuition-free public college, and getting big money out of politics.

The hard truth is that if we don't act now, we'll all be screwed. The President of the United States has no respect for the rule of law, the Constitution or even the concept of democracy itself. But neither do the corporations that are spending millions of dollars to give themselves and their rich friends trillion-dollar tax cuts. Our water, air, land - and our democracy - are being auctioned off to the highest bidder. Powerful special interest lobbies push their profit-driven agendas through every level of government.
Grassroots political power is the only way forward. From Kansas to Missouri, New York to Florida, the revolution is growing - and it is not coming from the Democratic Party or from the liberal establishment. The revolution is coming from the people.
[**Can you help Our Revolution build this movement in our communities? Donate $5 today to build on their organizing efforts for progressive change.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf6/38127536/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180919&noskip=true")
_" Fahrenheit 11/9"_ opens all across America on September 21. When you watch it, I hope it compels you to act. Working together, we could have a political revolution on our hands.
In solidarity,
Michael Moore
Director & Activist
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf6/38127536/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180919&noskip=true")**
P.S. On Wednesday, September 19, join me, Our Revolution and a host of other great organizations for the "People's Premiere." [**Over 100 theaters**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf1/38127536/VEsC/ "https://gathrfilms.us/fahrenheit/#screening") across the U.S. have signed up for a special sneak peek of the film 2 nights before it becomes available nationwide. Afterward at 9:45 PM PT/12:45 AM ET, I will do a livestream Q&A to discuss the film, where we go from here and the march towards November 6!
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf0/38127536/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf3/38127536/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbf2/38127536/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a934/bed43eb/74a2b6bc/75fcbbfd/38127536/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

"" " Fahrenheit 11/9" opens all across America on September 21. When you watch it, I hope it compels you to act. Working together, we could have a political revolution on our hands. In solidarity, Michael Moore Director & Activist "" P.S. On Wednesday, September 19, join me, Our Revolution and a host of other great organizations for the "People's Premiere." "" across the U.S. have signed up for a special sneak peek of the film 2 nights before it becomes available nationwide. Afterward at 9:45 PM PT/12:45 AM ET, I will do a livestream Q&A to discuss the film, where we go from here and the march towards November 6! All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: What’s the Matter With Westchester?
body:
**What’s the Matter With Westchester?**
_Suburbanites vote against their economic interest to advance social liberalism._

The Wall Street Journal | Bobby Jindal

|
---
_ILLUSTRATION: DAVID KLEIN_
While the media obsesses over all things Donald Trump, the Democratic Party is fighting an intense battle over the best way to defeat him in 2020. Relatively moderate candidates beat progressive challengers in gubernatorial primaries in Wisconsin, Michigan and Minnesota, but Democratic primary voters in Vermont and Georgia selected a transgender and a female African-American nominee who have gained national attention mainly for their precedent-breaking identities. Based on special-election results, Democrats seem to be overperforming with traditionally Republican suburban voters. The question is whether they can succeed in the midterm elections by targeting the same coalition that failed to put Hillary Clinton in the White House.

Whereas Midwestern Democrats are fighting to regain formerly neglected white working-class voters in industrial and rural communities, many already competing for the party’s 2020 nomination apparently think the future still belongs to the “coalition of the ascendant”: millennials, minorities and socially liberal whites, especially college-educated single women.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=9142&l=203&ctl=22D77:C15079EF2606CA7C357BC502949EB5C7696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C357BC502949EB5C7696548644412C47B)

subject: Thank you
body:
Dear Mr. Willis,

Thank you for contacting the campaign of Congressman Mo Brooks. I’d like
to start by asking you what you might be interested in doing for the
campaign? There are a number of ways that you can assist including
sharing and liking Congressman Brooks Facebook page, making a
contribution to the campaign, picking up a campaign yard sign at One of
our sign distribution locations for display in your yard, or if you live
in the fifth Congressional district of Alabama, you can join our army of
volunteers and Help to get out the vote!

Don’t forget to check our website (mobrooksforcongress.com ) for
upcoming events and announcements. We look forward to hearing from you!

If you would like a yard sign you can pick one up at Madison County GOP
headquarters located at 807 Shoney’s Drive in Huntsville. You can also
have someone deliver a sign or guide you to the closest location for a
sign pick up by emailing signs@MoBrooksforcongress.com

Thank you,
Mo Brooks for Congress campaign team

subject: We cannot afford to lose this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
This is important, Friends: My friend Joe Donnelly is running for reelection in Indiana, one of the Senate seats Democrats cannot afford to lose if we want to take back the Senate in November.
POLITICO and The Washington Post said Joe is one of the most "vulnerable" senators up for reelection this year, so the GOP is going all in to steal this Senate seat.
**Donald Trump personally endorsed Joe 's GOP opponent and just flew to Indiana to campaign for him last month - so Joe badly needs our immediate grassroots support. **
I know from personal experience that grassroots supporters like you are the difference between winning and losing in a race this close. **That 's why I'm counting on you to step up and give whatever you can spare. subject: New York Times: President Trump Hit Iran With Oil Sanctions. So Far, They’re Working.
body:
| |
---
#
# _New York Times: President Trump Hit Iran With Oil Sanctions. So Far, They’re Working._
In _The New York Times_ , Clifford Krauss writes that President Donald J. Trump’s oil sanctions on Iran—part of the President’s withdrawal from the fatally flawed Iran nuclear deal—are effectively weakening the regime’s leverage as oil companies across the globe bail out of deals with Tehran. “The president is doing the opposite of what the experts said, and it seems to be working out,” said Michael Lynch, president of Strategic Energy and Economic Research. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.nytimes.com/2018/09/19/business/energy-environment/iran-oil-sanctions.html) “The scale of America’s opioid crisis can be daunting. The latest numbers show that more than 72,000 Americans died of a drug overdose in 2017,” Secretary of Health and Human Services Alex Azar writes in [**_USA Today_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/trump-administration-making-progress-fight-opioid-epidemic/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr). “While the epidemic still rages, we are now seeing signs of national progress . . . The number of Americans initiating heroin use dropped by around half from 2016 to 2017.” In [**_El Nuevo Dia_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.elnuevodia.com/opinion/columnas/sbacontinuestohelphurricanemariarecoveryefforts-columna-2448049/), Small Business Administrator Linda McMahon shares how the Federal Government is continuing to help with Hurricane Maria recovery efforts in Puerto Rico. “In the year since Hurricane Maria struck, the SBA has approved 52,400 disaster loans totaling nearly $2 billion,” she notes. “Survivors of natural disasters can register at DisasterAssistance.gov to see the types of assistance for which they are eligible.” Democrats may be attacking President Trump’s trade actions with China, but the President’s latest move “is not rattling investors. That was the message from traders Tuesday, who sent stock averages soaring in the face of the latest round of American tariffs on Chinese imports and Beijing’s retaliatory response,” Liz Peek writes in [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://thehill.com/opinion/finance/407378-the-booming-economy-trumps-trumps-trade-battle-with-china). “President Trump toured the Carolinas on Wednesday to survey the wreckage and rampant flooding in the wake of Hurricane Florence, praising rescue efforts and meeting victims of the devastating storm,” Bob Fredericks reports for the [**_New York Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://nypost.com/2018/09/19/trump-visits-carolinas-to-assess-damage-from-hurricane-florence/). “In moments of despair, we’ve witnessed the true character of the American people,” the President said in Havelock, North Carolina.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTQ0MTUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE0NDE1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NjQyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Maria Giannopoulos - Digital Director
subject: Just how bad is Bob Menendez?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc

Peter,
**Bad Bob Menendez has disgraced New Jersey for too long.**

New Jersey voters deserve to know the truth. For years, Senator Menendez has hid behind a web of lies and corruption and now he is asking you to give him a pass and another six years.

But, just how bad is Bad Bob Menendez?
This new website documents corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez’s disgraceful record of corrupt politics, serving donors, violating federal law, and selling his office. **[BadBobMenendez.com](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=13f16eb74daa4e889e92a155e2b22861&_e=9KQGv65xCsxXY6D4yuvX-FpNa_vxgI6MS83ckz9qnvduf-qi-AjOL-inEuZ2ZJ0xa9s8JgQOYPKRgi4KrQajbcod3Mrzll8vpE385enHH6j7ggCpofDX6jvve-U-ML_kpyGu-OgMirTTX1RlbH5F6Qw09VsP2eFwhb1zjCHU6-Oyr9x-iDc0J7ea_hlwcJb8KnVZ9MQfN9P80sQdg5xwdoedrDeJLuh-isBpM6XiQxeUyvWJ21GK4dLW2VB0FV1pVxlqxvKymRZsVRK_XD1dPBOygq2U1hL7F99TjUdtwrzQE2hL3adeb98va9PcH-tudnDmVYD01b6o5TehOyFumqtZ8H5TczFFJ-Bxz1IU9BLIKCszyM9gfq5lczKiG2_e0H_F2njDYKdgnN3bYXdh-g%3D%3D)** is a source of information for New Jersey voters to learn more about Menendez’s well-documented actions that should disqualify him from serving the people of our state in public office ever again.

**It’s time for Bad Bob Menendez to go.**

**[Catch a glimpse into Menendez’s schemes and lies at BadBobMenendez.com>>](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=13f16eb74daa4e889e92a155e2b22861&_e=9KQGv65xCsxXY6D4yuvX-FpNa_vxgI6MS83ckz9qnvduf-qi-AjOL-inEuZ2ZJ0xa9s8JgQOYPKRgi4KrQajbcod3Mrzll8vpE385enHH6j7ggCpofDX6jvve-U-ML_kpyGu-OgMirTTX1RlbH5F6Qw09VsP2eFwhb1zjCHU6-Oyr9x-iDc0J7ea_hlwcJb858r1KmkRr2eN35p4SIWiA5O4fgX7KXllaNcqxzOonj5rmHr7NIz53IyZU0ChEE3vzR84QB6efHVnMHbwIhBgJICpA0IErsICyl2IElmBR_RWqvisf365R-zTxRqO9fG_-N-K7KOqBM8LHnaw_M1mNyL1wR0AfHgokVnJvx6qWFXF9slIgaL5UcsDVtWGngjtbuDV0ppL6OnfpwP_4gEwVA%3D%3D)**

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Two important campaigns in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
This is a big election year in Minnesota. You see it in the yard signs popping up, all the ads on TV, and yes -- a lot of emails. CNN even called Minnesota "ground zero" in the 2018 elections. With everything that's going on, **I want you to know about two critical campaigns for U.S. House in Minnesota 's 2nd and 3rd Congressional Districts.**
**Angie Craig** is running in the 2nd District. Angie knows what it's like to go through hard times, and as a business leader and mom of four, she's focusing on the issues that matter to every family: education, health care, job training, and our infrastructure.
And in the 3rd District, **Dean Phillips** is running to represent _everybody_. Dean has faced adversity too -- his father died while serving in Vietnam when Dean was just six months old. Dean went to elementary school in Edina, became an entrepreneur, and would bring years of valuable experience to Congress on behalf of Minnesota.
These are important races at a critical time for our country... **and they 're both really close.** I know firsthand that it's going to take committed support from people like you for Angie and Dean to win.
**Will you make a split donation to support Angie Craig 's campaign in Minnesota's 2nd District, Dean Phillips's campaign in the 3rd District, and my statewide reelection campaign?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Angie Craig, Dean Phillips, and me will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=G7x460YozS2TJgDpZzj8%2BXpKRMA1MWfZ)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BF7IL98Ph3RgvauHk23gNXpKRMA1MWfZ)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AnEnwptwuzTTcabf6dlUc3pKRMA1MWfZ)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=A%2F4G77EhJfq50Z3XvJFMy3pKRMA1MWfZ)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Mjt2B3yXTLYrleAEny3pO3pKRMA1MWfZ)****
Thank you,
Amy

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=N%2BcNRB5oXG1B%2FMNeXRfWrHpKRMA1MWfZ)**

name: Legislative Team (at Lipinski for Congress)
subject: Bipartisan solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RL2sa5iVTO3Sww4vonutHxIiz8Qk6Z3Vw2yeOQPfa7A=/Hd9u5zdDaziERnKeYM25j6rUB2c4wWeVnEa3_283UD0=)
Peter,

Dan has been hard at work in Washington fighting for your values. To help him do that, Dan became a founding member of the Problem Solvers Caucus, a bipartisan group dedicated to common sense solutions to the issues facing our nation.

The Problem Solvers Caucus has worked diligently over the past two years to fix the problems that everyday Americans care about the most -- including fixing the Affordable Care Act and reducing health insurance costs, developing a bill to end the government shutdown, and a plan to rebuild America's crumbling infrastructure.

**[Dan wants to know: do you support bipartisan compromises to America's hardest problems while putting an end to partisan political games? If so, add your name here to stand with him!](https://act.myngp.com/el/RL2sa5iVTO3Sww4vonutHxIiz8Qk6Z3Vw2yeOQPfa7A=/hUcCWoARUz2NeStJGeRvFfjtmKd4bBIh9atMZhvjfeI=)**

Thanks to Dan's leadership, the Problem Solvers Caucus worked up a plan to end the partisan stalemate over DACA and border security. The bill is a practical solution to our country's broken immigration system and has been praised by both sides of the aisle for its tough compromises, while also staying true to American values.

[**Sign here to stand with Dan and remind Congress: you work for the American people and now is the time to find practical solutions to our country 's biggest obstacles.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/RL2sa5iVTO3Sww4vonutHxIiz8Qk6Z3Vw2yeOQPfa7A=/hUcCWoARUz2NeStJGeRvFfjtmKd4bBIh9atMZhvjfeI=)

Dan and everyone here at Lipinski HQ appreciates your support!

-- Legislative Team at Lipinski for Congress

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

name: Tennessee Victory 2018
subject: Drug Overdose is a Leading Cause of Death in TN, thanks to Marsha Blackburn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee Victory 2018
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256562/11981039/945363798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=)

Peter,
It’s true.
The opioid epidemic that’s been ravaging the country has been worsening at an alarming rate, claiming the lives of 1,776 Tennesseans in the past year alone. Instead of working to fix this problem in Congress, [Marsha Blackburn pushed a bill that weakened the DEA’s ability to crack down on suspicious opioid shipments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256563/11981040/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=&v=imOkLGSeUgU&feature=youtu.be).

The danger is **real and immediate, and it will only get worse** with Marsha Blackburn in the Senate.

During her eight terms in Congress, [Blackburn has taken more than $800,000 from drug companies](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256564/11981041/-1028187484?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=&cid=N00003105&cycle=CAREER&type=C), and continues to take sides with her Big Pharma lobbyist friends in Washington while ignoring Tennesseans at home.
** ****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256565/11981042/945363798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=)**
** ****[TN Department of Health Office of Informatics& Analytics](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256566/11981043/1502745049?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=)**
_Fixing the opioid crisis is on the ballot in November. _
[**Chip in $35, $50, or whatever you can right now because Tennesseans deserve someone who will help them, not hurt them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256567/11981048/945363798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=)
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2256568/11981054/945363798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9ETkMvVE4vMS82NjMzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDhmMDU1Ny1mN2JjLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfouM8WGme0frGIZTwWBOylH0ryibittJn3SvcWqjNg=)**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180920_em-B&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Hi Team, Yesterday, we emailed you about the latest _Star-Tribune_ poll that shows our Senate race tightening and how we were behind on our September fundraising goals. We missed our $12,000 goal for yesterday and I'm about to report back to the team that we're behind. **[Could you pitch in $3 to help close this gap before midnight?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. The Cook Political Report moved their race rating towards Republicans, and we're being outspent by thousands of dollars on the airwaves.** Our only hope to close this gap and hit our giant September end-of-quarter fundraising goals before the deadline in 10 days is if every member of this team steps up and gives all they can now. We know Minnesota is a top target for Trump -- he only lost this state by 1.5 points in 2016. That means more visits by him and his allies, more outside special interest money, and more pressure from the other side on our campaign. **This race will be close and every dollar will matter. Please pitch in what you can now so we can close this gap and make sure this Senate seat stays in Democratic hands:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: This is the biggest threat to our elections.
body:
| | Millions of Christians Are Not Prepared to Vote
---
[ ](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180920apl01nd&n=1)
| Peter, We must recognize the obvious. Most Americans don’t know every candidate on their ballot. I’ve traveled the country and talked with tens of thousands of voters over my career and I can tell you it’s extremely rare for a voter to know every name on their ballot. Now don’t get me wrong. Some Americans have done their homework. They do know every candidate they are going to vote for—from dogcatcher to U.S. Senate. However, millions plan to vote but just aren’t informed. When they’re at the ballot box, they’re more likely to pull a name out of a hat based on how it sounds or what it rhymes with rather than match their values to the best representatives. That strategy may work on school exams **but in politics, ignorance at the ballot box could be the biggest threat to our country come November 6th.** Our effort to reach millions of Christians to vote is well underway—**but much remains to be done.** **Millions might commit to vote—but if faith voters don’t know the _who’s_ and _what’s_ on the ballot, then we will have only done half of our job. Christians will be engaged but not equipped.** Ignorance is a disease in our nation today, and the most effective antidote is relevant information. Thomas Jefferson, once said: _“If a nation expects to be ignorant and free, in a state of civilization, it expects what never was and never will be.”_ You may already know who you are going to vote for as Senator and U.S. House Representative. But what of the state legislature, judicial nominees or school board seats? The last thing we want to see happen is Christians entering the ballot box unprepared. Critical issues important to our faith – the protection for the unborn and defending religious liberty in the public square - will be decided in _this election_ at the state and federal level. **Faith voters need to do their homework. Will you help us equip them with the right tools to cast values-based votes?**
* My Faith Votes is working to provide every faith voter in America (regardless of state, city, or town) with access to a full electronic sample ballot. **Believe it or not, no one else is doing this on a national scale!**
* This tool also summarizes from each candidate’s website his or her stance on important issues such as Abortion, Immigration, and Education.
* We’ve already set up this tool in a bold step of faith—but we still need your help to fund this effort. At a cost of just $800 per state, together we can raise the $40,000 required to fully fund this effort and deploy this powerful tool.

This election will have generational ramifications—it is far too important to leave up to guesswork. **[Thanks to a generous matching grant, every dollar you give up to $20,000 will be matched dollar-for-dollar](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180920apl01nd&n=2).** **[Please help us equip fellow believers with this critical information before November by making your best donation today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180920apl01nd&n=3).** Especially when history’s in the balance. Issues of religious liberty, the sanctity of life, marriage, and family are all at stake. We _can_ protect Christian values in America if faith voters do their homework and make informed votes. We need your help to make this happen. Rhymes and nice-sounding names work in Nashville or Hollywood—but values sound best at the ballot box. I’m counting on you to help reach and equip faith voters across the country! [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180920apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180920apl01nd&n=4) God Bless. **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180920apl01nd&n=5)

clean_body: | | Millions of Christians Are Not Prepared to Vote | Peter, We must recognize the obvious. Most Americans don’t know every candidate on their ballot. I’ve traveled the country and talked with tens of thousands of voters over my career and I can tell you it’s extremely rare for a voter to know every name on their ballot. Now don’t get me wrong. Some Americans have done their homework. They do know every candidate they are going to vote for—from dogcatcher to U.S. Senate. However, millions plan to vote but just aren’t informed. When they’re at the ballot box, they’re more likely to pull a name out of a hat based on how it sounds or what it rhymes with rather than match their values to the best representatives. That strategy may work on school exams but in politics, ignorance at the ballot box could be the biggest threat to our country come November 6th. Our effort to reach millions of Christians to vote is well underway—but much remains to be done. Millions might commit to vote—but if faith voters don’t know the who’s and what’s on the ballot, then we will have only done half of our job. Christians will be engaged but not equipped. Ignorance is a disease in our nation today, and the most effective antidote is relevant information. Thomas Jefferson, once said: “If a nation expects to be ignorant and free, in a state of civilization, it expects what never was and never will be.” You may already know who you are going to vote for as Senator and U.S. House Representative. But what of the state legislature, judicial nominees or school board seats? The last thing we want to see happen is Christians entering the ballot box unprepared. Critical issues important to our faith – the protection for the unborn and defending religious liberty in the public square - will be decided in this election at the state and federal level. Faith voters need to do their homework. Will you help us equip them with the right tools to cast values-based votes? My Faith Votes is working to provide every faith voter in America (regardless of state, city, or town) with access to a full electronic sample ballot. Believe it or not, no one else is doing this on a national scale! This tool also summarizes from each candidate’s website his or her stance on important issues such as Abortion, Immigration, and Education. We’ve already set up this tool in a bold step of faith—but we still need your help to fund this effort. At a cost of just $800 per state, together we can raise the $40,000 required to fully fund this effort and deploy this powerful tool. This election will have generational ramifications—it is far too important to leave up to guesswork. . . Especially when history’s in the balance. Issues of religious liberty, the sanctity of life, marriage, and family are all at stake. We can protect Christian values in America if faith voters do their homework and make informed votes. We need your help to make this happen. Rhymes and nice-sounding names work in Nashville or Hollywood—but values sound best at the ballot box. I’m counting on you to help reach and equip faith voters across the country! God Bless. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman P.S. Faith voters need to be informed of the who and what on their ballots before casting their votes. I hope you will join me in helping to defend our country against the grip of ignorance by equipping faith voters this election—with this essential voting tool. ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Early voting starts tomorrow!
body:
** You can vote tomorrow!
------------------------------------------------------------
Early voting starts tomorrow, and that means everyone should start thinking about their plan for how they will get out to vote this year. It also means a lot of work for our campaign, but you can make that easier by using this app to remind your friends to vote: https://campaigns.outvote.io/ian-todd?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=5fe534a50e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_20_01_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-5fe534a50e-9291445

If you need more information on how to vote then go to CD6.info (http://cd6.info?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=5fe534a50e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_20_01_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-5fe534a50e-9291445) , where we have put together some helpful links to get people out to the polls early.

This election is one of the most important mid-terms in modern history, so make sure to get your friends out to vote and to spread the word about early voting.

Donate Today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=sep20&amount=200&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=5fe534a50e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_20_01_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-5fe534a50e-9291445)

** September Deadline!
------------------------------------------------------------
September is the end of the 3rd Quarter, and this quarterly report will be one of the last reports before the general election, which means it is one of the most important filing deadlines. The more we can raise before that critical deadline, the more media attention our campaign will get and the more we will be able to invest in our GOTV efforts.

We need to come out of September as strong as possible so that we are ready for anything that might come up in October. Donate today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=sep20&amount=200&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=5fe534a50e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_20_01_42&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-5fe534a50e-9291445) to keep us on track for November.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: About Judge Kavanaugh:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

**At town hall meetings and forums this week, I have been asked for my thoughts on Judge Kavanaugh and the current situation with the Supreme Court. I 'd like to share with you what I've said to those constituents:**

First: I think it's important to acknowledge that nobody is entitled to be on the Supreme Court of the United States. But we are entitled to have high standards for those who would sit on the nation's highest court.

Second: This charge by Dr. Christine Blasey Ford is very, very serious. When my opponent, Corey Stewart, heard the allegation, he called it "a bunch of crap." And he tweeted something out that said, _" What else did Judge Kavanaugh do -- pull a girl's pigtail in 1st grade?"_ **What he is doing is equating pulling a girl 's pigtail and attempted rape. There is absolutely no equivalence there. None. These are very serious charges, and we need to treat them as such.**

So what do we do?

Well, the right thing to do is to give Dr. Ford the opportunity to be heard in a fair manner -- and to of course hear Judge Kavanaugh's response. And the other thing that's important is that, should there be other witnesses, it's important that we hear them out _under no artificial timeline._

**This is not a box-checking exercise -- it is a meaningful effort to figure out who this person is that may serve on the Supreme Court.**

This is a serious situation, with serious consequences for our country. Americans deserve a full and fair investigation into this. More updates to come.

_-Tim_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1180/3e0906/7084fe3d/3e361b5d/3784434955/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180920_1_NA_TK_kavanaugh&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180920_1_NA_TK_kavanaugh&source=20180920_1_NA_TK_kavanaugh")
---
* * *
|

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: Monday: How you can help on debate night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
There are plenty of ways to volunteer!

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37861b/7ab0e2c4/7e3c0385/3498eae6/3125170927/VEsH/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdQpIWaX8Myq1MwHCzaBKZr0sTfLF8DxRFhQ9Qur2QXRJzOWA/viewform") Friend, Did you know our first and only debate of the general election is on Monday, September 24? **Well, it is -- believe it or not, we're down to the wire on this campaign, and now it's all hands on deck.** [**You can be a huge help on Monday night: Will you volunteer for a debate night activity?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37861b/7ab0e2c4/7e3c0385/3498eae6/3125170927/VEsE/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdQpIWaX8Myq1MwHCzaBKZr0sTfLF8DxRFhQ9Qur2QXRJzOWA/viewform") Here are some big ways you can help on Monday:
* **Join a visibility team:** You can show your support loudly and proudly by coming to the debate site on Monday morning to help set up and show folks how excited they should be for Ben as Maryland's next governor.
* **Host a watch party:** Get together with your friends, family, and neighbors to watch the debate on Monday evening -- you'll receive a debate night watch party tool kit and other suggestions to make your night a huge success.
* **Attend a local watch party:** Join folks at a local coordinated campaign office to watch the debate with other big Ben supporters!
* **Join the rapid response team:** You can be a huge help right from your couch. Use your Twitter and social media to give live updates through the debate.

It's time for Maryland to know just how great Ben is, and you can help make that happen by joining in however you can on Monday, September 24. [**Volunteer to help on the day of the debate now by filling out this quick form to let us know how you'd like to get involved, and a member of the Jealous team will get back to you!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37861b/7ab0e2c4/7e3c0385/3498eae6/3125170927/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdQpIWaX8Myq1MwHCzaBKZr0sTfLF8DxRFhQ9Qur2QXRJzOWA/viewform") Thanks for being on the team, Jerusalem Jerusalem Demsas
Communications Director

clean_body: There are plenty of ways to volunteer! | "" Friend, Did you know our first and only debate of the general election is on Monday, September 24? Well, it is -- believe it or not, we're down to the wire on this campaign, and now it's all hands on deck. "" Here are some big ways you can help on Monday: Join a visibility team: You can show your support loudly and proudly by coming to the debate site on Monday morning to help set up and show folks how excited they should be for Ben as Maryland's next governor. Host a watch party: Get together with your friends, family, and neighbors to watch the debate on Monday evening -- you'll receive a debate night watch party tool kit and other suggestions to make your night a huge success. Attend a local watch party: Join folks at a local coordinated campaign office to watch the debate with other big Ben supporters! Join the rapid response team: You can be a huge help right from your couch. Use your Twitter and social media to give live updates through the debate. It's time for Maryland to know just how great Ben is, and you can help make that happen by joining in however you can on Monday, September 24. "" Thanks for being on the team, Jerusalem Jerusalem Demsas Communications Director Ben Jealous for Governor | "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

body:
There's no better example than Tammy's failure on the opioid scandal at the Tomah Veterans Affairs Medical Center.

Friend, let's be blunt: Tammy Baldwin cares more about protecting her political career than she cares about the people of Wisconsin.

There's no better example than Tammy's failure on the opioid scandal at the Tomah Veterans Affairs Medical Center.

When the lives of our veterans were at stake, Tammy did not solve the problem. She refused to tell anyone there even was a problem despite all of the evidence of wrongdoing!

Then, she swept the scandal under the rug to avoid negative attention for herself, President Obama and the Democrats. Tammy offered hush money to a staffer to stop her from talking about how she failed our veterans.

And when that didn’t work, she hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and rehabilitate her image.

It's unconscionable and WISCONSIN DESERVES BETTER.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabl3y4cN1fZCqpnOhcJ76OENkhmK4pK7OF3trosMgTB9KXHJu2pXCqzkynF0A5OyJqYl16G9WK30E1r95hErSXXTFgGTa_3tTcsNt-v2_bcXTpiIhUi-tN_Jice6SuPdB3y6rKbEhJvDeTp-xC0J4feckdMk11y8iOwCTbjtmqqeJzR-m2FQnRYzNaJrRp2t16qlf34EyYiDo-zGSCi_CdP85Imd5Ov7CWWox61aQd-62MpFAbdxjZItCPzvs4wkT8-yBrXsQZsHBO8FyYYrEIxpYe6AyVX3IkPl7dRhvNp2QpB2W_9uoa4RKlh0jaYrShrUzVLYMX46uRQu6QmXVSmpZZzbv8nT3Q4bGs7oa9GGIF9y1ZB9Mlbamj-Xf3AHbu4NTx1ooVdBjWrdFaTv4f5o%3D)

Make no mistake about it: Tammy Baldwin let our veterans down at the Tomah VA.

She was the only person in Wisconsin’s congressional delegation to have known a doctor was over-prescribing opioids. A veteran died and many others became addicted.

And she did nothing.

She sat on a report.

And now, the only excuse she has is blaming her staff for her failures? That sounds a lot like the Washington way - take no action and blame everyone else for it.

That's not the Wisconsin Way. And it's not the kind of leadership Wisconsin needs.

I hope you'll join me to help Defeat Tammy Baldwin and bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabl3y4cN1fZCqpnOhcJ76OENkhmK4pK7OF3trosMgTB9KXHJu2pXCqzkynF0A5OyJqYl16G9WK30E1r95hErSXXTFgGTa_3tTcsNt-v2_bcXTpiIhUi-tN_Jice6SuPdB3y6rKbEhJvDeTp-xC0J4feckdMk11y8iOwCTbjtmqqeJFuafw2BZgXt101BWnR8_5Gxk7gWPichD1kglw6ORgzahbDdIoHg60rYQCr8ev1b59ht_RUZDrVoTWxGJftYLFitdM7gKqVZJmxNXdRbpEf9aUbBtu_hfC5eDb2GHQJFyM5oK2QGxRqWGgCCkQUbBDrhTPQH__Xwzo-EZxFGibZgRY-jafCF4ISlxcKK3ZPXGHB9alGBku-Cu__9p2CBFDXpRY5XkJQK8ApJpaQKHfQE%3D)**

Together, we can protect our veterans and make the government accountable to people like YOU. Not just Tammy Baldwin's elite, out-of-touch friends.

-Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=Kol-RSduenSM6h-BKx3-WUt7ySK_Y4vjlY91NjuVkKY5ROfZq06KI10aVIW4sTr0UW883lo4zUijeDWdt73O69KhvxIy200DTysYle5mXvOac6ueh1HjWF4nCjRofeBKNlqyF-p5FG3r5OS7FwIChCpGoRFhqCqJiEgYBrKlJn6cM51KuugzWlfQRHkCV-jdj_pcvXoZiid0oX4hgpaqMPDeFAunh4qlqOkZR6sTQl-0ulzrSp32EhwGua49FDAP). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabjcrib2QTM7ReWbSegK_0YWQizjfKeNzCZT3NZcbbO3zDQfJElgPkJQ3KofPbEPw4I3CtpGeYlnUh4r64K6P1SIEoAYih7fVhyW6TW4D4PRml53wvICjvjfv31w86rlHr9aWahZhSfrq9PmLA0Rc0XE-0VjtlVa_zkpmVTpQn8gPnHh5BOw19hQbvrVcse555ZW-y2AFdlUh20T2JlOXKl8ZERdq04t6oaPzXkGIEgsZUK6dR0Qp-Z77j4YewlstW4d0pGwHYICoe_DWPAmO-zN6qQz6GeXJpKXmmzY00isSeegIeRoVVHnXvcaQTUsP3mO-crVNsrdUFebsmAukSIqkyGiZgRX7GibL6mqV2Ymj) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabjcrib2QTM7ReWbSegK_0YURVc-CGbTUey2Yh4AbcbP4oL0badSvjsClaEJS68r39mlqW6bt63WS1aGsbVNP-PmIxnOVNKiW4D5mtHi2Z2YdG2M1tCuYhEbs6kuLye7ToMZwxwwUCoGUWId1So5JsZZtCeFmr7_YQnRXIV_AE-Xenw9nMMSX5irG2ON8LnHZ6pMw4c-Rn7LsAOnkZVUjY5Jy5GzPOAMzVnD2k_7uZVfqZ1pX0dhoBvOJiI05IaN_HbrjssDhbgf0Oye_vrJZFZSVNFQg7aRIofsyIo4xOP_oBBxDG4wFEZDk7B_YZIUbheXLb_mXxZq96au3fvST7sEyHPSIagwXmFB3t483jdq1) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabtlIMzraiVFJA9IeCn7C2Q_-TTCaPkT50rMFHjKQCWDG9cldLg8EfbEhFWwlOlRgpGht6eldALA_y-O1SwZomosQSXuit9EtvJUw9fEWqnzoBtQntjQf8kOu9DSvsD-rF5RGaApBL4qCQ9xMPHTCK8GMZC961hyL9_xNYNF5Nok4rEzeP6ndCIhSunbLJBC4Cj56quTKN3Urk9TcxOpZOwAQ9rnH9F5e96HL5oUNUQEg8CJDDAmtnPzylmjEP2QcGw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabvJ6hcSfB4tpVj3acTctTKTBcMyVzXpa94XxzEfwWNeZqddZnX-MS6gHQgcWtL6LEK4NX44axt4s2ybhaq7FPzrwJxjUKP2EA_7aeTnc7GtpjFDS5HKhJ1v3LdbD6pB4wPuRaIvwtTQ-I71kfF4mX0E5S5AU-ZkFuTKn1jVtwdJQeg31HRCJHhlTsCXtG1WbVI6adQUT22HyC7f6elyVbqyYwJkElvRaWs73EC_-Rzbw1u85IDQ0ePKqcxXrJJjW5w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabqNQH-8qlSz-NJQWtk9CuYq4VKOWX0Unf8U5qZjzH8XNXW3Vbxvadoglj66pM1_qUEOniOkNPkRyPqZwCy-rJX8PzVHyUt3Hb2GpJPsB5-EGydxMCBJ-e3_f1_45UXemDtRRasJmW9vJHLa9Jqjwt5S4r8T7dXOQksmbeS-jRQ7LcC_ULO-HDSB_ZlNDdbrYaGSoCSScrOntRLF9--7z-0ieZZwOYf_vC43VUAC4jiAr-u7JPAUtNmmK5fBBczAwqw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=25CkWiNXoibSlJf_b_pabjcrib2QTM7ReWbSegK_0YWqRtsXXTxDjSeC-B42XoJh3bvkyPugCSNt8H54oeK5crXiaaC8lpDyXIgKXP8XCv-DIqN-LqZA4oxF5eulrY76ncAnc4zUeS5SWFQik52cnH-7buKQg81U88xXCJVPR5DJokfdBRZhYRO58M2qEC8BPZx_6DNiEEF6xEOpgMJs51Bq1OD8KKA-Dm8J33NdQm9Kf7RjiJTEt76-fyo1suFiVWAHj_Kz0gResHfJDmv16Z-2w2NzgHNBoT8gxQ410IrKRuHm7RTL-159AUxdzji4w4KMKaz3ZL8bffiiJiedKqhPbzc7a0SwDUt0_fSzcpRlmRzXa7yyIt6e2hkXrvl2pXjssjJYR6ULPzt1Ty3ozw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=Kol-RSduenSM6h-BKx3-WUt7ySK_Y4vjlY91NjuVkKY5ROfZq06KI10aVIW4sTr0UW883lo4zUijeDWdt73O69KhvxIy200DTysYle5mXvOac6ueh1HjWF4nCjRofeBKNlqyF-p5FG3r5OS7FwIChCpGoRFhqCqJiEgYBrKlJn6cM51KuugzWlfQRHkCV-jdj_pcvXoZiid0oX4hgpaqMPDeFAunh4qlqOkZR6sTQl-0ulzrSp32EhwGua49FDAP) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=59aab063c0e84d3e865fad4b69bbd09c&_e=Kol-RSduenSM6h-BKx3-WUt7ySK_Y4vjlY91NjuVkKY5ROfZq06KI10aVIW4sTr0UW883lo4zUijeDWdt73O69KhvxIy200DTysYle5mXvOac6ueh1HjWF4nCjRofeBKNlqyF-p5FG3r5OS7FwIChCpGoRFhqCqJiEgYBrKlJn6cM51KuugzWlfQRHkCV-jdj_pcvXoZiid0oX4hgpaqMPDeFAunh4qlqOkZR6sTQl-0ulzrSp32EhwGua49FDAP) to unsubscribe. name: Molly Kelly for Governor
subject: sorry to email you like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Our most important fundraising deadline of the campaign is at midnight tonight, friends. But right now, we need to raise another $3,500 if we're going to flip New Hampshire blue.
I'm not accepting the corporate special interest money that's fueling Chris Sununu's campaign. But that means I won't stand a chance against him and his deep-pocketed right-wing allies without the help of this grassroots team.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: A DIRE warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
This sounds like a good idea.
#

Sisters and Brothers,
Kevin Cramer, the Republican candidate in a top-tier U.S. Senate race had a pretty dire warning about the stakes in this election. He said:
* * *
“If Democrats take control of the United States Senate, the Chairman of the Budget Committee will be Bernie Sanders.”
* * *
That sounds like a good idea to us. Let’s take back the Senate.
But accomplishing that goal requires winning a few tough races and electing strong progressives like Tina Smith in Minnesota and Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin.
**[Can you split a $3 donation between Senators Tina Smith’s, Tammy Baldwin’s, and Bernie’s campaigns? This is the most important FEC deadline of the campaign. Let’s make it count.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2709?refcode=em180920-full&t=25&akid=153%2E150750%2EJKBjwi)**
A few polls have these races pretty close. Within single digits. So your support today could mean the difference between victory and defeat. The difference between a Democratic Senate and a Republican one. The difference between Budget Chairman Mike Enzi or Chairman Bernie Sanders.
Thanks for chipping in,
Jeff Weaver
Team Bernie
****[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/2709?refcode=em180920-full&t=26&akid=153%2E150750%2EJKBjwi)****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=153%2E150750%2EJKBjwi). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&akid=153%2E150750%2EJKBjwi).

Friend --

In just a few hours, Donald Trump's face will be plastered all over the news channels. He'll be in Vegas today to stump for his hand-picked candidate for governor, Adam Laxalt.

So we've got to be prepared to fight back.

**[We still need to raise $10,000 more for our Trump Response Fund before the rally. Can you contribute $5 or more now to help us reach our goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZHXRKl61PoY9BY8ZLUxDL36VkEGl6f-m3-R4SGxUQVM=/Ro2BkXbyiInTWUHMUtvE8Wp5dK2OgbhUCERYAZwtcHk=?gpsid=37_57_3723&refcode=em18_180920_DTLV3_L1_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DTLV3_L1_fnd_gq_act__CA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

name: Erin Dolan
subject: A record of discrimination and extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Bob Hugin as a student at Princeton University led the fight against women joining the all-male Tiger Inn dining club and actively worked against protections at the university for gay and lesbian students.

Hugin continued the fight against women joining the male-only club by dragging out a lawsuit filed by a female undergrad for nearly 13 years. Then, years later, when the New Jersey Supreme Court ruled that women were allowed to join, Hugin called it "politically correct fascism."

And that's not all. Hugin even worked to stop gay and lesbian students from being included in Princeton's anti-discrimination policy, saying that providing basic protections for gay students is **too controversial and that if a member of his club was found to be gay, "he wouldn't last long."**

Now that Bob Hugin is running for United States Senate, the people of New Jersey will not ignore his record of discrimination and extremism.

[**If you believe that all New Jerseyans deserve a seat at the table, no matter their gender or sexual identity - stand with Democratic Senator Bob Menendez by chipping in $3 or more today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc7/3af3c5d/3af8e5f7/4ec3de03/2055577305/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-princeton?gpsid=5_73_3708&refcode=em18_180920_Prince_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_Prince_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+If+you+believe+that+all+New+Jerseyans+de")

During his time in the United States Senate, Bob Menendez has been a champion for women and the LGBTQ community.

He has sponsored a constitutional amendment for women's equal rights, has reinforced anti-discrimination and equal-pay requirements and has fought for more funding and services for victims of domestic violence.

Senator Menendez has been steadfast in his support for New Jersey women and our LGBTQ community and has a proven track record of fighting for them. Bob Hugin has never been on our side, and he never will be.

[**Bob Hugin does not stand with New Jersey women or the LGBTQ community. If you want a Senator who has and will continue fighting for equal rights for everyone - chip in $3 or more right now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc7/3af3c5d/3af8e5f7/4ec3de02/2055577305/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-princeton?gpsid=5_73_3708&refcode=em18_180920_Prince_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_Prince_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Bob+Hugin+does+not+stand+with+New+Jersey")

Thank you,

Erin Dolan
Menendez for Senate

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc7/3af3c5d/3af8e5f7/4ec3de05/2055577305/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-princeton?gpsid=5_73_3708&refcode=em18_180920_Prince_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_Prince_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Donate")**

name: Dana Bye
subject: how we will counter the Koch brothers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The Koch brothers have pledged to spend hundreds of millions of dollars this election to defeat candidates like Abigail -- so it is on us to prevent them from buying our local elections.
| | Peter, As we've mentioned previously, the billionaire Koch brothers are targeting our race in VA-7. They have pledged to support Rep. Dave Brat's re-election campaign and stop Abigail from flipping this district blue. We're not, of course, surprised by this. Rep. Brat is a member of the extreme House Freedom Caucus and has long supported the Koch brothers' agenda, while Abigail is standing up to special interests in this campaign. To name a couple examples: Abigail is not taking a dollar from corporate PACs, and this week, **she rolled out a bold[campaign finance reform platform.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/qbT13huqSQG8FMdYlc_u5-EXV59M42JWECmr1tD5epA=)** It includes overturning the flawed _Citizens United_ decision that allows big donors like the Koch brothers to spend unlimited sums of money to influence our elections. The Koch brothers have pledged to spend _**hundreds of millions of dollars**_ this election to defeat candidates like Abigail -- so it is on us to prevent them from buying our local elections. [**Will you help us fight back with a grassroots donation today? You can choose to split your donation between our campaign and other House candidates facing the Koch brothers this fall, so your support will truly go a long way.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/HdQ346_whE8PrLGSLn4mQREY3Rx8NwMGJB2TWSc4gAE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.20_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) As always, I want to thank you for [**your support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/HdQ346_whE8PrLGSLn4mQREY3Rx8NwMGJB2TWSc4gAE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.20_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) of our campaign, Peter. There are 47 days until the election, and [**every grassroots contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/HdQ346_whE8PrLGSLn4mQREY3Rx8NwMGJB2TWSc4gAE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.20_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) makes a difference as we seek to win this toss-up race -- and counter the influence of the Koch brothers and other special interest groups. Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/HdQ346_whE8PrLGSLn4mQREY3Rx8NwMGJB2TWSc4gAE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.20_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/I5reTjpSG6UPrVMsLUdps8gDqKJs67Y2VAsVz6FCBW0=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/WK8ftt-9gQjegG2-ehRFC3l_3BJIhuf90EvH5ifl3mU=/XG25qowGlIkXx8bsoq4VzjQA8tVIqbAdwW8SOTMxGYo=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

subject: Do you have a moment?
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ | | | |
---
| | [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjYzLWM1ODYyNGUwM2EzZjQxMWQ4MjgzODllNTFlZTZiNzZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1BQcmVzaWRlbnRpYWwzMDkyMDE4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1oaWdoZXJlZHVjYXRpb25zdXJ2ZXkmYXBwZWFsX2NvZGU9TUs4MTdFTTM&K=dnwB0biKTCJ_QS4gxKygqQ)
---
| | | Fellow American, I'm sure you've seen it in the national news, but I'd like to reiterate: There is serious hostility towards the founding principles of liberty on college campuses. Many college students are not taught the true meaning of terms like "Freedom" and "Equality." They are accepting false promises of free college and health care and voting for candidates who wish to embrace that fantasy. This is evidenced by the voting records of millennials in the last election, where **many more voted for Bernie Sanders in the primaries than both Clinton and Trump combined.** Worst of all, students on college campuses refuse to engage with those whom they disagree. Instead, many resort to intimidation, threats, and rioting in a manner that incites violence. I'm curious to know what you think about the state of higher education in America. If you have a few minutes, I'd love to ask you a few questions about the state of America's education system, and whether the damage to it can be repaired. Take the survey now >> [**https://www.research.net/r/hillsdale_higher_education_survey**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjYzLWM1ODYyNGUwM2EzZjQxMWQ4MjgzODllNTFlZTZiNzZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1BQcmVzaWRlbnRpYWwzMDkyMDE4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1oaWdoZXJlZHVjYXRpb25zdXJ2ZXkmYXBwZWFsX2NvZGU9TUs4MTdFTTM&K=ujfd7mohkhXVPiNlhi_1nQ) | [**Take the Survey**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjYzLWM1ODYyNGUwM2EzZjQxMWQ4MjgzODllNTFlZTZiNzZi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVzZWFyY2gubmV0L3IvaGlsbHNkYWxlX2hpZ2hlcl9lZHVjYXRpb25fc3VydmV5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9HT1BQcmVzaWRlbnRpYWwzMDkyMDE4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1oaWdoZXJlZHVjYXRpb25zdXJ2ZXkmYXBwZWFsX2NvZGU9TUs4MTdFTTM&K=CQXuQxz_-awjAHapuwR_Fw)

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

They are accepting false promises of free college and health care and voting for candidates who wish to embrace that fantasy. This is evidenced by the voting records of millennials in the last election, where many more voted for Bernie Sanders in the primaries than both Clinton and Trump combined. Worst of all, students on college campuses refuse to engage with those whom they disagree. Instead, many resort to intimidation, threats, and rioting in a manner that incites violence. I'm curious to know what you think about the state of higher education in America. If you have a few minutes, I'd love to ask you a few questions about the state of America's education system, and whether the damage to it can be repaired. Take the survey now >> | Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria VA, 22314

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: A letter to Puerto Ricans:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c02/1975930594/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Read Mayor Andrew Gillum's letter to Puerto Ricans as they continue to recover from Hurricane Maria.
**[Then add your name to join him in supporting our brothers and sisters.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c05/1975930594/VEsE/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-Puerto-Rico?gpsid=13_55_3719&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Then+add+your+name+to+join+him+in+suppor")**
[ADD YOUR NAME](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c04/1975930594/VEsF/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-Puerto-Rico?gpsid=13_55_3719&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME")
---

Friends,

Today, I want to take a moment to acknowledge the one-year anniversary since Hurricane Maria ravaged the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

I want to start off by saying that we stand in solidarity with you here in the state of Florida, I still believe, as many of you do, that the way in which our government responded to our fellow U.S. citizens was a complete disaster.

**You deserved better. Puerto Rico deserved better. Our nation deserved better. And again, I want you to know here in the state of Florida we stand in solidarity with you.**

We'll do everything that we can to be a strong helpmate to you. For those of you who have decided to relocate to the state of Florida, we want to make sure that you have access to the services and the support that you need to get back on your feet. And whether you choose to go back to Puerto Rico or permanently call Florida your home, we want to embrace you.

Hopefully, as the next Governor of the state of Florida, not only will we be friends in times of natural disaster and the aftermaths of natural disasters,, but in educational exchange and cultural exchange and economic exchange. We're going to be a real partner.

I enjoyed my time visiting Puerto Rico, getting to know the people in the most populated parts but also in the interior of the island. You can expect that we'll make another trip once we win this race and build a lasting friendship that will carry us over the ages.

Again, we salute you. We are in solidarity with you today as we commemorate one year since that hurricane. Let us commit to ensuring that the response that you experienced never happens again.

In solidarity,

Andrew Gillum

**_[Add your name to Mayor Gillum's letter now and join him in standing with Puerto Rico.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c07/1975930594/VEsC/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/add-your-name-Puerto-Rico?gpsid=13_55_3719&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+to+Mayor+Gillums+letter+no")

[En Espanol.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c06/1975930594/VEsD/ "https://andrewgillum.com/una-carta-a-los-puertorriquenos/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+En+Espanol&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx")_**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c19/1975930594/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c18/1975930594/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ec/9e00690/5d08cb38/24016c1b/1975930594/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180920_PR_engg_gq_act__AG_ettx")
