name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: America’s first cyber strategy in 15 years
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 20, 2018
## America’s first cyber strategy in 15 years
##
##
**America and its allies are under attack** **every day in cyberspace.** Malicious actors try to undermine our safety and security by damaging our national infrastructure and upending the lives of ordinary Americans. **In response to this growing threat** , President Donald J. Trump has unveiled America’s first comprehensive cyber strategy since 2003. The plan builds on the four priorities outlined in the Administration’s broader National Security Strategy:
1. _Protect the American People, the Homeland, and the American Way of Life_ by securing our information systems and combatting cybercrime
2. _Promote American Prosperity_ by pursuing cyberspace as an engine of economic growth, innovation, and efficiency
3. _Preserve Peace through Strength_ by identifying, countering, disrupting, degrading, and deterring bad behavior in cyberspace
4. _Advance American Influence_ by preserving the long-term openness, security, and reliability of the Internet

**The United States** is engaged in a continuous competition against strategic adversaries, rogue states, and terrorist and criminal networks. These new threats demand a new response. The Administration’s answer to these risks is anchored by enduring American values—a belief in the power of individual liberty, free expression, free markets, and privacy. [**President Trump unveils America’s first cybersecurity strategy in 15 years**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-unveils-americas-first-cybersecurity-strategy-15-years/). **Go deeper** : [**See the full report here**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/National-Cyber-Strategy.pdf).
## Video of the day
##
**Yesterday, President Trump visited** the Carolinas, getting a firsthand look at communities impacted by Hurricane Florence. Meeting with local leaders and first responders, the President had a message: “The Federal Government is behind you.” [**Watch President Trump visit families affected by Hurricane Florence**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ObRBiq66sHQ)
# Unemployment claims just keep falling
**Positive economic news** is becoming a near-daily staple during the Trump Boom. Gone are the day when “secular stagnation” and endless talk of permanent slow growth were the dominant themes of American economic commentary. **Weekly jobless claims** fell again last week, reaching a near half-century low. _Reuters_ had this to say: “The labor market is viewed as being near or at full employment. It continues to strengthen, with nonfarm payrolls increasing by 201,000 jobs in August and annual wage growth notching its biggest gain in more than nine years.” **The U.S. stock market roared this week** , as well, with both the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 setting record highs. Today’s news is “a sign of investors’ conviction in a booming U.S. economy,” Michael Wursthorn reports for [**_The Wall Street Journal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/global-stocks-pause-after-recent-gains-1537428686). **“S &P 500 HITS ALL-TIME HIGH,” **the President tweeted. “Congratulations USA!” [**Reuters: The number of Americans filing for unemployment benefits falls**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/reuters-u-s-weekly-jobless-claims-fall-as-labor-market-strength-continues/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump embraces a young boy in North Carolina while helping victims of Hurricane Florence** | September 19, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIwLjk1MTY3MzgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMC45NTE2NzM4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4ODk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Kyle Plotkin
subject: URGENT: Only one day left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
The moment President Trump lands in our state, the first thing he will ask Josh is “how is fundraising going?”Hello Peter,

I’ve been looking at our numbers, and I have to say _I’m getting nervous_. There's just one day until Trump visits Missouri, and we still need $11,932 to hit our fundraising benchmark.

The moment President Trump lands in our state, the first thing he will ask Josh is “ _how is fundraising going_?” The last thing Josh wants to do is let him down.

That’s why we’re reaching out to Team Hawley’s most loyal supporters - people like you. We need to show President Trump that Missouri is behind Josh 100%, and the best way to do that is through strong fundraising numbers.

The only way to get there is by having your name on the donor list. Please donate today: [https://secure.joshhawley.com/](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e846c4c81ffa4cd9b3fec230605bb71f&_e=vMk_tyqkiOEzPjURF8QZ4pJ96X1Ps2R_JGsbp4HYk9BABG9PBb3SKRzssy2sfvLPYpsbbybaFNmT79sEMF74G6teuEZdHSdkuURxRBER7Awu7NZG-KVHdVM5vzdsSV-HniNc9rcg1jZ9X7nDe5nM_Ivrlt1D7zbmXpE_Eipw9ry1U2r84-uZ2KREF6lvoWtZDt4nMBFWANP6WPawzOPGvWzcH39qx7_qhOe-ekSatC-m5SkM_3bRvSTJkJwmaDg9oRAPHDXJSvzyp7axjzsDznEJYAChRESWch3ySr0cENuZMDH9IpPRdF2fpTqcWdwDo7AfN1u8TxmQ5u_2hfQbXEoeb852LRUIfsUPJ0PtgJCoqgd9QqqkdN1Em0o41nOrqsHuzX4CWJ_hg6oRLgAuHg%3D%3D)

_**Let our President know you’re on his team, that you support his ally for Senate, and donate to Team Hawley today.**_

I know Josh can’t wait to tell the President that your name is on the list.

Kyle Plotkin
Campaign Manager
Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: the Super PACs are BACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We told you about the far-right Super PAC that dumped tens of thousands of dollars this summer, boosting Wendy Rogers. Well, the same Super PAC is back.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f3a/1a8421e1/1a5e9344b/491612bd/1941567160/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, We told you about the far-right Super PAC that dumped tens of thousands of dollars this summer, boosting Wendy Rogers -- our opponent who thinks Social Security is _unconstitutional_. _Well, the same Super PAC is back_ , spending even more money to boost Rogers and defeat Tom. **The far-right is NOT giving up its pursuit of this seat.** **[We should expect outside money to keep pouring in, team, so can you make a donation today to help us continue the fight to keep AZ-01 blue?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.20_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. We're not surprised that this Super PAC is continuing to prop up Rogers, of course -- she supports the agenda of big-moneyed special interests who are desperate to take down Tom and replace his independent voice with a rubber stamp for the far right.

It's up to us to make sure they don't succeed. [**Stop the Super PACs: CHIP IN >> **](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.20_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Team O'Halleran

name: PA Senate Update
subject: it's too close, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6206/51dbcc2a/1c83e34c/3ab7e6b/3478550939/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team -- we aren't afraid to admit it: we need your help.

The race for the Senate majority is getting close. Every day there's a new article saying that Democrats can take back the Senate, but that we need to win some key races to keep hope alive. Every path to victory relies on one thing: keeping Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat blue.

[**_Time is running out, and Bob needs your help -- rush $5 or more to protect Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate today._**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180920_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

_Roll Call_ published an article this month listing the top ten vulnerable Senate incumbents, and Bob's name was on it. With Republicans spending millions of dollars to unseat vulnerable Democrats like Bob this year, we have to be prepared to fight back, but that costs money, which is why we're asking for your financial support today.

**We need to get Bob's message about fighting for all Pennsylvanians to as many voters as possible before November 6. Can you rush $5 or more to help defend Bob?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180920_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180920_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Fighting the Liberal Lie

#
Friends,

Like President Trump, I am one of many conservatives supporting the nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh, he is a constitutional conservative who prioritizes the Constitution’s original meaning. The radical left is at it again. Judge Kavanaugh is subject to a smear campaign by the Left who are so frequently attacking my character and conservative constitutional values as well.

Will you join the fight for courageous conservative leadership? Justice kavanagh has a long record of fighting for our principles and I too have a record of supporting and defending the Constitution; our conservative ideals are at stake!

My record of fighting to stop Obamacare, to cut wasteful spending and to secure our boarder, along with supporting a strong principled conservative to the Supreme Court could all change, if Republicans do not keep control of the US House of Representatives.

We have to stop the Left but I need your help!

Whoever gets elected in November, will have a huge impact on the vote for our next Supreme Court Justice nominee and confirmation if delayed, along with the legislative policy agenda, economy and in Arizona our biggest concern immigration policies.

[Click here to make a contribution today](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=67e5dbe420&e=7ca82c1e3d)

Until the November election we will fight to return to Washington D.C. and continue to represent Constitutional values, and issues facing Arizona’s District 4.

Thank you for your continued friendships and support.

---
|
---
| **Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Claire, Emily, Pinky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire for Senate (D) | 31811 Pacific Hwy S Ste B #288, Federal Way, WA 98003
body:
To hold the progress we've made here in Washington, we've got to keep the Senate.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bd42/2f5ea88d/7556df76/2cbc7d84/2716327972/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-slate?utm_source=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&refcode=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&utm_campaign=wa-slate&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'll be upfront. If we're going to stop Republicans from rolling back the progress we've made in Washington state over the past two years, **Democrats _must_ keep control of our State Senate.** We've seen how, when Republicans controlled the Senate, they thwarted the will of the people time and again. **We are only one seat away from losing our majority -- and our progress.** The fight for Senate control will be neck and neck. And so the three races I'm going to tell you about are make or break for us. We need to come together to support three exceptional women running this November. [**Before I tell you more about them, Claire, Emily, and Pinky need our help -- chip in $25 to support all three of them today!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bd42/2f5ea88d/7556df76/2cbc7d84/2716327972/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-slate?utm_source=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&refcode=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&utm_campaign=wa-slate&utm_medium=ema") **Claire Wilson (Legislative District 30)** Claire is an education professional and president of the Federal Way School Board. She has dedicated her career to ensuring every child, from early learning to higher education, has the opportunity to succeed, As a senator, Claire will work to ensure our schools are fully funded and our children prepared for current and emerging careers. And she'll fight to ensure Federal Way taxpayers receive their fair share of infrastructure improvements to cut traffic and create jobs. **Emily Randall (Legislative District 26)** Emily is a third-generation Kitsap Peninsula resident and was raised in a family of veterans and union workers, hospital employees and educators. Emily learned government can be a force for good when the legislature expanded Medicaid access, allowing her younger sister Olivia -- born with severe developmental disabilities -- to receive life-saving health care coverage. In Olympia, Emily will work to guarantee Washington families in our region can access affordable healthcare. And she's ready to fight to expand rural broadband access, infrastructure investments, and higher education opportunities so our rural economies can grow and create more local jobs. **Pinky Vargas (Legislative District 42)** Pinky is president of the Bellingham City Council and an energy efficiency expert for Puget Sound Energy. In her professional role, Pinky helps the community save money on energy costs while reducing the environmental impact. As a city council member, Pinky is working to create affordable housing, keep Lake Whatcom clean, and balance the budget without new taxes. As a senator, Pinky is committed to putting people first by holding accountable the big corporate special interests that pollute our air and water and get special tax loopholes to avoid paying their fair share. She'll stand up for families -- fair taxes, better health care, more housing, good schools, and a clean environment. [**Friend, we need Emily, Pinky, and Claire in the State Senate, fighting for education, healthcare, infrastructure, rural broadband access, preserving our environment, and protecting women's rights. Can you contribute right now to help elect Pinky, Claire, and Emily in November?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bd42/2f5ea88d/7556df76/2cbc7d84/2716327972/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-slate?utm_source=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&refcode=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&utm_campaign=wa-slate&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bd42/2f5ea88d/7556df76/2cbc7d84/2716327972/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-slate?utm_source=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&refcode=ema_2018-09-19_wa-slate&utm_campaign=wa-slate&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bd42/2f5ea88d/7556df76/2cbc7d9b/2716327972/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). First, _FiveThirtyEight_ changed our race rating to a "toss-up."

We've got the momentum to win -- all we have to do is keep it. name: Team Denham
subject: FW: debate prep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Denham for Congress
body:
Jeff is about to take to the podium to participate in the first debate of this election.

Friend,

Jeff is about to take to the podium to participate in the first debate of this election.

Jeff has been working tirelessly to advocate for the needs of the Valley, from defending our water rights to making sure that we keep our promises to our veterans.

To show Jeff that we appreciate all his hard work, we’re putting together a list of supporters who have his back. Before he steps on stage tonight, we want to show him a long list of everyone who chipped in to support his vision for the Valley. [**Will you please join us by contributing just a little bit?**](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=22277b6f7d0e4157bf6c823eda81bd09&_e=vV9MlzfEqoCTHiYtBwB0qdE0ksUVTxcmWP7UxIMjjmTLLBIAAuup80ZfThYWYH3cA_4V_fH5JwnfKtd0hB676_PLeIRbZr2eygql1QG3TgHaXMXpAbSBjzQou_Lpp4V0j6auSZHxlmA2VDY2Qi6CxAR5EwDtNfCV2npb4TuyNywAyPQ6rTn-dtd3a5G0amyouQGctw5mTS2QT8SqZgH86FVsm8jOCc9Rd7Xb0VC12RphMOz5uPN2YYMke9lFV9IITGrWAwcbVthYVsxC0QRygB6E83rsRYWxX7wwuft306bkW6tAS-1eY2Vn42izx8FLrUZC9XKJLtQG3LrLQzK0HnbJdUtOI4SwJYjCcSUzvZJgB8rFg6iPlv_3TwQNmK6v4roBxCXr0OL8HU_-FWiTL_sxCx6nNQUdTKiAsM3gHzA%3D)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Consider this request straight from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|

| | Peter -- I want to personally thank you for being part of this grassroots team. **Thanks to your incredible efforts, our match program is officially open.** [**Any amount you chip in between now and midnight tomorrow will be matched by a generous group of donors. | | | Here's the thing: with only one month until the start of early voting, Gary Johnson or super PACs could go on the air against Martin any day now.

**_[That's why we're rushing to expand our Media Fund so we're prepared for the attacks coming Martin's way. **Early voting in New Mexico starts in ONE MONTH! **That means it's more important than ever that we reach all the voters we need to.

As the last line of defense, I'm standing in the way of Donald Trump and Republicans' attacks on the issues we care about most. And I'm fighting back to make sure that we keep moving Pennsylvania forward.

Over the past three years, I worked to:
* Restore the billion dollar cut to education made by Harrisburg Republicans,
* Expand Medicaid so more than 720,000 people now have health care,
* Advance LGBTQ equality by setting up the first statewide LGBTQ commission in the nation,
* And protect a woman's right to choose by stopping some of the most restrictive anti-choice bills in the country.

But we still have a steep hill to climb if we're going to continue our progress.

There are historic Republican majorities in the Pennsylvania House and Senate. And big money Republicans and special interests are doing everything they can to protect their seats -- and to elect a Republican governor in Pennsylvania.

They've made Pennsylvania a top target since Donald Trump won our state by less than one point. They think that Democrats here are vulnerable.

Let's prove them wrong.

**[Please, chip in $5 now to help our campaign:](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-trumpjr-visit?utm_campaign=em18_180920_trumpjr-visit_fnd_clq_act_em3_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180920_trumpjr-visit_fnd_clq_act_em3__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=14+-+Please+chip+in+5+now+to+help+our+campaig")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Trump-Jr-Visit](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-trumpjr-visit?utm_campaign=em18_180920_trumpjr-visit_fnd_clq_act_em3_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180920_trumpjr-visit_fnd_clq_act_em3__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=15+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomTrumpJrVisit")**

Thank you,

Tom

name: Chris King, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Ron DeSantis has the wrong priorities:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016df8/3339310665/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&source=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx")
Friends, they're at it again.

Apparently, divisive, gutter politics-style attacks on Mayor Andrew Gillum's character and integrity weren't enough for our opponent. Now, Ron DeSantis has taken to spreading lies that Andrew wants to "destroy capitalism."

Let's be clear: Andrew and I have bold, progressive plans that put Floridians first and will move our state forward. Instead of the failed status quo, we're simply out to do right by working people so that our state works for everyday people again -- through fully-funded schools, access to affordable healthcare, and an economy that works for all Floridians.

But apparently, that's striking fear into DeSantis and the political insiders who back him, which is why they're resorting to these blatant, desperate falsehoods. It's a sad way to campaign, but it's how Donald Trump, Rick Scott, and Ron DeSantis try to keep a broken political system going in the face of an insurgent, grassroots campaign like ours.

**[Can we count on you to rush a donation of $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us counter these absurd, negative attacks?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016dfb/3339310665/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-desantis-attack?gpsid=13_55_3755&refcode=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+rush+a+donation+o")**

DeSantis has the wrong priorities for Florida, plain and simple. In Congress, he voted with Trump 94% of the time -- even when it would protect big health insurance companies, corporate polluters, and the gun lobby at the expense of our families.

Floridians suffered under politicians who have had the wrong priorities for far too long -- and we can't afford another four years of the same failed status quo.

It's time to make everyday Floridians the priority. As your next Governor and Lieutenant Governor, Andrew and I will focus on improving schools, making healthcare more affordable, and fighting for a better future for all Floridians.

**[It's long past time we had leaders who will stand up for all Floridians. So please, chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, to help us win this November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016dfa/3339310665/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-desantis-attack?gpsid=13_55_3755&refcode=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+Its+long+past+time+we+had+leaders+who+wi")**

Bring it home,

Chris King

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016dfd/3339310665/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-desantis-attack?gpsid=13_55_3755&refcode=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016dfc/3339310665/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016dff/3339310665/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&source=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ef/9e00690/5d1a1888/24016dfe/3339310665/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx&source=em18_180920_DSAtk_fnd_gq_act__CK_ettx")
